ssh_agent.c(3) Library Functions Manual ssh_agent.c(3)

NAME

ssh_agent.c

SYNOPSIS

Functions


bool ssh_agent_is_available (void)
Check if ssh-agent is running and available. bool ssh_agent_has_key (const public_key_t *public_key)
Check if a public key is already in ssh-agent. asciichat_error_t ssh_agent_add_key (const private_key_t *private_key, const char *key_path)
Add a private key to ssh-agent. asciichat_error_t ssh_agent_sign (const public_key_t *public_key, const uint8_t *message, size_t message_len, uint8_t signature[64])
Sign data using SSH agent with the specified public key.
